race.description: Flower Hotels Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: ADEQUATE EZE (1) returns from a 160-day spell for a second campaign. Has found the line well to finish second at all three runs to date. Probably settles a bit closer this time and has the ability to round them up over the concluding stages. APPARENTLY (8) has had two runs back from a 15-month lay-off and failed to threaten. Will appreciate an extra 100m today and this is an easier assignment than the last one at Wyong. Capable of turning things around. Perennial placegetter SWEET MARLENE (12) likes some give in the track and is racing well. Well in after the claim and should be thereabouts again. SUNSTAZ (7) was plain last start but can improve third-up over a bit more ground today. LAGAVULIN (10) gets a bit of weight relief at her third race start and is not out of the equation.
